description_for_human: Convene a board of advisors on any decision and read the minutes.
description_for_model: Quorum exposes a multi-tenant board of advisors as MCP tools. Each session is scoped to one tenant and one user. Available tools include list_boards, get_board, list_advisors, list_sessions, get_session_minutes, convene_session, wait_for_session_completion, branch_session, list_decisions, and record_decision_outcome. Resources are quorum://tenants/current, quorum://boards/{boardId}, quorum://sessions/{sessionId}.
